security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious votes could alter the outcome of governance decisions.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Tampering with votes can lead to unintended governance outcomes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote data.
The actor can submit manipulated vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks (e.g., hash verification) for votes.

description: An attacker might manipulate vote data to influence the outcome of governance proposals.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes makes it difficult to trace fraudulent actions.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Without proper logging, tracing fraudulent votes is difficult.

assumptions: The system lacks a comprehensive audit trail for votes.
The actor can cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure logging mechanism to record all votes cast, including timestamps, user IDs, and vote details.

description: An attacker might cast votes and deny their involvement due to a lack of audit trail.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be exposed before being processed by the contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive data may be exposed during the voting process if not handled securely.

assumptions: The system transmits votes in an insecure way.
The actor can intercept the data stream during transmission.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote data during transmission and storage.

description: An attacker might intercept or eavesdrop on unencrypted vote data.
